pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 38 (rm -f command) and task.json description
seed_demodb.py line 52 creates database with this exact name; confirmed in multiple scripts
All four profiles created in seed_demodb.py lines 195 (john.smith), 207 (thomas.schafer), 206 (elena.petrakis), 201 (yuki.tanaka)

privileged_info_summary: The 'shortest_path_social_network' task uses a synthetically generated social network in an OrientDB 'demodb' database. The network contains 15 profiles with 10 bidirectional friendship edges, forming 5 connected components. The target analysis focuses on four specific users: john.smith@example.com (in a 7-node component), thomas.schafer@example.com (in a 4-node component), elena.petrakis@example.com (in the same 7-node component as john.smith), and yuki.tanaka@example.com (in a separate 2-node component). The graph structure results in: no path between john.smith and thomas.schafer (disconnected components), a 3-hop path from john.smith to elena.petrakis (via maria.garcia and sophie.martin), no path between john.smith and yuki.tanaka (disconnected components), and exactly 2 friends-of-friends for john.smith (emma.white@example.com and sophie.martin@example.com). The expected output file is located at /home/ga/shortest_path_results.json.
